The role focuses on both acquiring new resellers and driving revenue performance from existing ones, ensuring alignment with AppsFlyer’s business objectives across the mobile app ecosystem.&lt

Track and analyze reseller performance across pipeline, Closed Won, and retention metrics.&lt

Market Intelligence and Strategy&lt

Benchmark ecosystem-wide reseller programs and recommend continuous improvements.&lt

Minimum 3-5 years of experience in Channel Sales or Partnership Management, preferably within the mobile app or SaaS ecosystem.&lt
Proven track record in partner-sourced revenue generation and enablement.&lt
Strong understanding of the mobile marketing and analytics landscape.&lt
Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship management skills.&lt
Experience using CRM or PRM tools (e.g., Salesforce) to manage partner performance.&lt
Basic understanding of AI applications in marketing, measurement, and automation, with curiosity to leverage AI for partner performance insights and efficiency.&lt
Analytical mindset with the ability to assess partner ROI and pipeline health.&lt
Self-motivated, outcome-driven, and able to thrive in a fast-paced environment.&lt

column3: Platform &amp
column5: Scale Leadership: Lead the architectural efforts to modernize and significantly scale the company’s infrastructure across multiple geographies and heterogeneous cloud providers.&lt

column7: Protect360 BetterBid product is looking for an experienced Data Software Engineer.&lt

column3: BetterBid is a real-time decision engine operating directly on the bid path of large ad platforms. For every opportunity, it generates fraud and optimization signals before the budget is committed and before downstream systems even engage.&lt

The system processes billions of bid requests per day (5M+ per second at peak) and returns decisions in ~10ms end-to-end. Behind it sits a data platform ingesting ~500B events per day (~465TB) from global mobile activity.&lt

We build large-scale ETL and feature pipelines using BigQuery, Dataflow (Apache Beam), Dataform, and Airflow, and train ML models and generate statistical signals from massive historical datasets. The real-time layer consumes these artifacts via ultra-low-latency services backed by Bigtable, deployed across multiple regions to meet aggressive latency and availability targets.&lt
Built at AppsFlyer, the world&#39
column4: s leading mobile measurement and attribution platform, this is a greenfield initiative with new architecture, new infrastructure, and direct influence on product and business decisions. We own the system end-to-end: from Kubernetes and OpenTelemetry-based observability, through data pipelines and model serving, to high-performance backend services.&lt

The BFSI (Banking, Financial Services, and Insurance) vertical is one of the most strategically important growth areas for AppsFlyer in the APAC region. With the acceleration of FinTech, InsurTech, and digital-first financial services across markets like India, SEA, and China, BFSI brands are redefining customer acquisition, engagement, and retention through mobile-first strategies.&lt

As financial institutions double down on marketing efficiency, regulatory adaptation, and real-time measurement, the need for tailored insights, benchmarks, and industry-specific narratives is higher than ever. This role plays a key part in deepening AppsFlyer&#39
column4: s consultative partnership with the BFSI ecosystem - helping us guide key clients, shape our GTM strategy, and capture upside across a high-potential vertical.&lt

column3: &lt

The Industry Lead - BFSI will serve as AppsFlyer’s subject matter expert in the BFSI vertical across APAC, with a focus on Southeast Asia. This is a senior-level, cross-functional role with high visibility across strategic accounts and regional leadership. This role demands vertical ownership, industry expertise, and the ability to influence decision-making at multiple levels across the organization and client base.&lt

While not a team management role, this position requires strong influence, industry credibility, and the ability to work across functions: Sales, CS, Marketing, Product, and Data, to support the region’s most strategic accounts in FinTech, digital banking, insurance, and beyond.&lt
&lt
Develop and execute AppsFlyer’s BFSI vertical strategy across Southeast Asia and broader APAC markets, including FinTech, NBFCs, digital banking, and insurance.&lt
Support Sales and Customer Success teams with vertical-specific insights to influence strategic deals, renewals, and upsell opportunities.&lt
Build trusted relationships with senior stakeholders (incl. CMOs, CDOs, growth leaders) by delivering actionable insights and vertical benchmarks.&lt
Establish thought leadership by representing AppsFlyer at BFSI conferences, publishing insights, and participating in industry panels, forums, and executive-level discussions.&lt
Collaborate with analysts to define, monitor, and scale key vertical KPIs and benchmarks.&lt

Understand the core business challenges faced by BFSI organizations — such as acquisition cost, user retention, regulatory complexity, and digital transformation and translate them into relevant MarTech use cases powered by AppsFlyer.&lt
Identify market trends, regulatory shifts, and customer challenges across SEA, India, and China, translating them into actionable input for GTM and Product teams.&lt
Support customer retention and expansion by partnering with CS on adoption, engagement, and advocacy for BFSI clients.&lt
Where relevant, engage with ecosystem stakeholders (e.g., consultants, martech vendors, or trade bodies) to build collaborative momentum in the BFSI space.&lt
&lt
10+ years of experience in BFSI or FinTech, ideally across growth, digital, marketing, or strategy roles, with exposure to regional (SEA and APAC) dynamics.&lt

Familiarity with financial regulation, digital banking, and mobile-first innovation in markets like Thailand, SEA, India, and China, including relevant bodies such as BOT, MAS, or local regulators.&lt
Demonstrated ability to influence CXO-level stakeholders through insight-led engagement and strong vertical credibility.&lt
Experience partnering with Sales, Customer Success, and cross-functional GTM teams on high-value enterprise opportunities.&lt
Highly analytical with the ability to extract and translate performance data into client value and strategic recommendations.&lt
Comfortable contributing to public-facing thought leadership, including content, presentations, or industry participation.&lt
Strong cross-cultural collaboration skills and ability to work across diverse markets and teams.&lt
Proven ability to connect business goals and challenges in BFSI with measurable marketing and attribution solutions, creating value-based narratives for enterprise stakeholders.&lt
Based in Bangkok

This role is ideal for marketers who combine strong analytical and creative skills with a strong sense of ownership. column25: We’re looking for a talented Product Analyst to join the Audiences team at AppsFlyer.&lt

column3: The Audiences team operates as a strategic product and business unit within AppsFlyer, powering segmentation and activation for leading brands. In this role, you will work closely with product, data science, engineering, and business stakeholders to drive data-informed decision making across product development and business performance.&amp

You’ll analyze large and complex datasets to understand product usage and customer behavior, uncover opportunities for product and business growth, and ensure key decisions are grounded in rigorous analysis. You’ll also work closely on capabilities such as Predictive Audiences, analyzing ML model outcomes to generate insights that inform product strategy.&lt
The role reports directly to the Head of Audiences and requires a high level of ownership, driving analyses end-to-end and shaping product and business decisions through data.&lt
&lt
Own analytical investigations end-to-end, from framing the problem to analyzing complex datasets and delivering insights that support product strategy and feature development.&lt
Define product KPIs and success metrics for new features and initiatives, and measure their impact to guide product decisions.&lt
Perform business analysis on customer segments, adoption patterns, and revenue signals to identify growth opportunities for the Audiences business.&lt
Partner with data science and product to evaluate machine learning-driven features, analyzing model performance, audience behavior, and business impact.&lt
Build and maintain dashboards, monitoring tools, and ETL processes that provide visibility into product performance and business metrics.&lt
&lt
3–5 years of experience as a Data Analyst, Product Analyst, or Business Analyst, preferably in a SaaS or big data company.&lt
Strong proficiency in SQL and experience working with large-scale datasets.&lt
Hands-on experience with BI tools such as Looker, Tableau, PowerBI, or similar.&lt
Strong ability to present insights through clear data storytelling and communicate analytical findings effectively to non-technical stakeholders.&lt
A proactive and curious problem-solver, able to frame the right questions and translate complex data into clear product and business insights.&lt
Bachelor’s degree in Industrial Engineering, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Economics, or a related field.&lt
&lt
Experience working with large-scale data platforms such as AWS (Athena, S3, Redshift) or Google BigQuery.&lt
Familiarity with machine learning concepts or experience working with ML-driven products or features.&lt
Technical approach with a strong understanding of data pipelines and ETL processes.&lt

&lt

Work on innovative initiatives at the intersection of AI, product analytics, and marketing technology.&lt
Join a fast-moving environment that encourages ownership, learning, and growth.&lt

column3: About the Role&lt

AppsFlyer is hiring a Senior Marketing Manager, India, to help lead and scale our marketing efforts in one of the most dynamic and competitive mobile-first markets. In this role, you’ll contribute to shaping and executing a cohesive country marketing strategy spanning demand, events, partnerships, and customer engagement.&lt

You will co-manage the full marketing funnel in close collaboration with Sales, Customer Success, Partner Development, and Global Marketing teams, while overseeing vendors and (potentially) freelancers to deliver high-impact programs that drive revenue and market growth.&lt
